title: I Built a Fitness Product Store in 10 Minutes - No Code, No Monthly Fees, 0% Commission
content:
The online fitness market is growing at 30% per year. Personal trainers, yoga instructors, and home workout creators are pulling $4,000+/month selling workout plans as digital products.

No massive following required. No fancy equipment. Just a solid plan, the right format, and a platform that does not eat your profits.

## Why Fitness Creators Should Sell Digital Products

If you are a fitness professional, you are already doing the hard work - creating programs, tracking progress, adjusting routines. Turning that into a product you sell once and deliver forever is the natural next step.

- **Passive income** - A workout PDF you create today can sell hundreds of times without additional effort
- **Global reach** - Your local gym has limited clients. An online store reaches 200+ countries
- **Multiple price points** - Single-page checklist at $10, comprehensive 12-week program at $80-$200
- **Zero overhead** - No printing, no shipping, no inventory

## What Fitness Products Can You Sell?

### Downloadable PDFs ($10-50)
The simplest format. Workout plans, meal plans, stretching routines, recovery guides. Buyers download instantly.

Examples: 30-day bodyweight challenge, post-pregnancy fitness plan, beginner-to-advanced calisthenics, weekly meal prep for muscle gain.

### Video Courses ($50-200)
Package your programs as video tutorials. Exercise demos, form corrections, progression guides.

### Training Bundles ($30-100)
Combine workout PDFs + meal plans + progress tracking sheets + video demos. Higher perceived value = premium pricing.

### Link Products (Variable)
Already host content on Teachable, private YouTube playlist, or Google Drive? Sell access as a link product.

## The Platform Problem

**Social media DMs** - Messy, unprofessional, no payment tracking, no automated delivery. Does not scale.

**Marketplaces** - Your plan sits next to thousands of others. Platform takes 10-20% per sale.

**Your own website** - Full control but technical setup, hosting costs, ongoing maintenance.

**Direct payment platform** - Branded store, automated delivery, buyers pay you directly.

[3DIMLI](https://www.3dimli.com/) supports multiple product types (Ebooks for PDF plans, Video for courses, Link Products for hosted content), charges 0% commission, and sends payments directly to your PayPal, Stripe, or Razorpay.

## Setting Up Your Fitness Store

1. **[Register on 3DIMLI](https://www.3dimli.com/register)** - Free during beta
2. **Brand your store** - Name, banner, bio, certifications, social links
3. **Connect payment gateway** - PayPal/Stripe/Razorpay. Payments go directly to YOUR account
4. **Upload products** - Ebook for PDFs, Video for courses, Link Product for hosted content
5. **Set license-based pricing**:
   - Standard License at $29 (personal use)
   - Commercial Redistribution at $99 (gym owners/coaches using your plan with clients)
6. **Add preview images** - Cover page, sample workout day, table of contents, transformation photos

## The Commission Math

50 sales/month at $35 per workout plan:

| Platform | Commission | You Keep (Monthly) | Annual Loss |
|---|---|---|---|
| 10% commission | $175/month | $1,575 | $2,100 |
| 15% commission | $262/month | $1,488 | $3,150 |
| 3DIMLI (0%) | $0 | $1,750 | $0 |

That $2,100-$3,150 annual savings can go into better equipment, marketing, or more products.

## Marketing That Works for Fitness

- **Instagram/TikTok** - Post workout clips, form tips. Link to your [store](https://www.3dimli.com/search) in bio
- **YouTube** - Free workout videos that build trust, mention paid programs
- **Free lead magnets** - Set any license to "Free" on 3DIMLI. Give away a 7-day starter plan
- **Client testimonials** - Nothing sells fitness products like results

## Scaling Up

- **Build a product line** - Beginner, intermediate, advanced versions. Mobility, strength, HIIT, yoga
- **[Bulk upload](https://support.3dimli.com/Guides/bulk-uploads%20and%20watch%20folder)** multiple products efficiently
- **[Product variants](https://support.3dimli.com/Guides/creating-product-variants)** - Basic PDF $15, bundle with meal plan $35, premium with video $79
- **Expand product types** - Audio (guided meditation), Graphics (workout posters), Software (tracking tools)
- **Go international** - PayPal, Stripe, Razorpay = payments from 200+ countries

---

Your fitness expertise is worth packaging. [Start your free store on 3DIMLI](https://www.3dimli.com/register) - 0% commission, direct payments, 10 minutes to set up.
